system.effect: The psyker jams and disrupts mechanical devices with telekinetic interference. All machines, weapons, and technological devices within Psy Rating x 5 metres of the target point cease to function for the duration of the power. Cybernetic implants are also affected.

description.value: The psyker sends out a wave of telekinetic disruption that interferes with the function of machines and technology. All mechanical and electronic devices within Psy Rating x 5 metres of the target point cease to function while the power is sustained. This includes ranged weapons, vox-casters, auspexes, vehicles, and cybernetic implants. Affected devices resume normal function when the power ends.
